ItacPersonItem.Notes: On Querenghi`s life, works, and academic experiences, see Uberto Motta, Antonio Querenghi (1546-1633),. Un letterato padovano nella Roma del tardo Rinascimento (Milan: Vita e pensiero, 1997).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
